name: twelve-sided-leviathan-website
description: TTRPG blog website using lightweight UI framework

scripts.start: npm run build && npx serve build -p 3000
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:content
scripts.serve: npm run build && npx serve build -p 3000
scripts.dev:run: npm run build && concurrently "node scripts/build-content.js --watch" "npm run watch:css" "npx serve build -p 3000"

author: niko
